rulings.Case Title: MARILOU D SAMSON VS. ONE WEST BANK, FSB et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thuresday, September 20, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANTs ONE WEST BANK, FSB and US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Continued to October 5, 2012 at 9:30 AM. rulings.Case Title: FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION VS. EILEEN HINDS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thuresday, September 20, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT EILEEN HINDS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
